_comment: Search ranges for the tunable agent constants. Only keys listed here are varied by the tuner; every other key in config.json is held at its default. Ranges are set to semantic limits (not anchored to the current defaults). Defaults: rotation=10, offset=15, enemy_offset=5, reinf_turns=20, decay=0.5, frontier=1.4, ally=0.8, horizon=30, max_distance=38.
